meta.title: Roofing Services
meta.description: Explore Roofpro's full range of residential and commercial roofing services — repairs, installation, energy-efficient systems, gutters and more, backed by a workmanship warranty.

header.description: From storm damage repairs to full installations and energy efficient systems, our licensed crew delivers craftsmanship you can trust on every roof, backed by a solid workmanship warranty.

process.description: From the very first contact to the final on-site walkthrough, we keep every step clear, documented and predictable, so you always know exactly what is happening and what comes next.

inspection.title: Free Inspection
inspection.description: We assess your roof on-site, document the condition and identify exactly what needs attention — at no cost.

quote.title: Transparent Quote
quote.description: You get a clear, itemised quote with no hidden fees, so you know precisely what you're paying for before we start.

installation.title: Expert Installation
installation.description: Our certified roofers complete the work with premium materials, on schedule and with a tidy, respectful job site.

warranty.title: Warranty & Aftercare
warranty.description: Every job is backed by our workmanship warranty, plus a post-install inspection and ongoing support whenever you need it.

faq.description: Clear answers to the questions we hear most often about project timelines, material warranties, insurance claims and exactly what to expect from start to finish on your roofing project.

items.q: How long does a typical roof replacement take?
items.a: Most residential re-roofs are completed in 1–3 days, depending on the size, pitch and materials. We'll give you a precise timeline with your quote.
Yes. We document storm damage thoroughly and work directly with your insurer to make the claims process as smooth as possible.

items.q: What roofing materials do you offer?
items.a: Asphalt shingles, metal, TPO, EPDM and modified-bitumen systems for low-slope roofs — we'll recommend the best fit for your property and budget.
Every installation comes with our workmanship warranty, on top of the manufacturer's material warranty.
Absolutely. Our rapid-response crew handles storm damage and leaks, often tarping and securing your roof within hours.
